surfaces.label: Editor Dashboard
surfaces.purpose: Show planned editor-level overview of article inventory, unresolved AG25Z work and pending review states.
surfaces.input_source: AG25Z readiness matrix and unresolved work register

surfaces.label: Browse Admin-Assigned Articles
surfaces.purpose: Browse only articles/draft assignments sent by Admin to the Editor, filterable by category, type, readiness, reference, attribution and layout status.
surfaces.input_source: AG25A inventory and AG25Z unresolved work register

surfaces.label: Prepare Admin-Assigned New Article Draft
surfaces.purpose: Prepare a new article draft only when Admin assigns a new article task to the Editor; no independent article creation is allowed.

surfaces.label: Edit Admin-Assigned Existing Article
surfaces.purpose: Edit only an existing article assigned by Admin; the Editor cannot browse or self-select unassigned repository articles.

surfaces.label: Assigned Article Structure Editor
surfaces.purpose: Edit structure, sections, reflection blocks and object anchors only within an Admin-assigned article workspace.

surfaces.label: Assigned Article Tool Browser
surfaces.purpose: Browse article preparation tools only inside an Admin-assigned article workspace; tools cannot be executed independently.

surfaces.label: Reference Manager
surfaces.purpose: Expose future manual fields for reference URL, source type, credibility, claim support and editorial verification status.

surfaces.label: Image/Object and Attribution Manager
surfaces.purpose: Expose future manual fields for image/object source, credit, licence note, generated-asset note and editorial verification status.

surfaces.label: Assigned Article Object Manager
surfaces.purpose: Plan graphs, tables, infographics, figures and diagrams only for the Admin-assigned article.

surfaces.label: SEO/Card/Summary Editor
surfaces.purpose: Plan fields for meta description, card title, summary, category badge and article preview text.
surfaces.input_source: AG25D card and layout audit model

surfaces.label: Assigned Article Preview Panel
surfaces.purpose: Preview assigned article, card, mobile layout, references and objects before sending back to Admin.

surfaces.label: Send Back to Admin / Return with Notes / Hold Panel
surfaces.purpose: Send edited work back to Admin, return with editorial notes, or hold for clarification; Editor cannot publish.
